title: Editors
description: Plan, coordinate, revise, or edit written material. May review proposals and drafts for possible publication.

tasks.text: Read copy or proof to detect and correct errors in spelling, punctuation, and syntax.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Verify facts, dates, and statistics, using standard reference sources.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read, evaluate and edit manuscripts or other materials submitted for publication, and confer with authors regarding changes in content, style or organization, or publication.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop story or content ideas, considering reader or audience appeal.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare, rewrite and edit copy to improve readability, or supervise others who do this work.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Oversee publication production, including artwork, layout, computer typesetting, and printing, ensuring adherence to deadlines and budget requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write text, such as stories, articles, editorials, or newsletters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise and coordinate work of reporters and other editors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with management and editorial staff members regarding placement and emphasis of developing news stories.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan the contents of publications according to the publication's style, editorial policy, and publishing requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review and approve proofs submitted by composing room prior to publication production.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Assign topics, events and stories to individual writers or reporters for coverage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Meet frequently with artists, typesetters, layout personnel, marketing directors, and production managers to discuss projects and resolve problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor news-gathering operations to ensure utilization of all news sources, such as press releases, telephone contacts, radio, television, wire services, and other reporters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Select local, state, national, and international news items received from wire services, based on assessment of items' significance and interest value.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Allocate print space for story text, photos, and illustrations according to space parameters and copy significance, using knowledge of layout principles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make manuscript acceptance or revision recommendations to the publisher.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct the policies and departments of newspapers, magazines and other publishing establishments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Arrange for copyright permissions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interview and hire writers and reporters or negotiate contracts, royalties, and payments for authors or freelancers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Read material to determine index items and arrange them alphabetically or topically, indicating page or chapter location.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
